name: Stafford South
description:
Stafford South covers the areas around the Manor, Highfields, Western Downs, Rowley and Penkside.

The neighbourhood is home to Rowley Park sports stadium and Stafford Castle, the area also includes the residential area of Castlefields, Stafford Rugby Club and Rowley Hall Hospital plus community football pitches, a golf course, allotments and a range of schools and churches.
